title: Halimus sesuviodes
taxonomy: Halimus sesuviodes is classified as a species within the genus Halimus and the family Plumbaginaceae. The genus Halimus belongs to the order Plumbaginales and the class Magnoliopsida. It is a flowering plant native to certain regions. The family Plumbaginaceae is part of the larger group of flowering plants known as angiosperms. The classification of Halimus sesuviodes is further categorized in the kingdom Plantae.
